title: CAF strips Senegal of AFCON title, Morocco declared African champions
text: Governing body's appeal board rules Senegal forfeited final after players' walked off pitch over referring decision.

title: Ireland’s Micheal Martin and Trump in awkward St Patrick’s Day exchange
text: Ireland, which took strong stance on Gaza genocide, is similarly robust on Iran, but Martin is criticised for passivity.

title: Top US counterterrorism official resigns over Iran war, urging Trump to 'reverse course'
text: National Counterterrorism Center Director Joe Kent says Trump "started this war due to pressure from Israel and its powerful American lobby".

title: Air strike hit Kabul rehab centre as patients ate dinner, survivor tells BBC
text: The exact number killed in Monday night's strike by Pakistan is still not known, but is feared to be in the hundreds.
